title: Savings Sloth
short_description: Sydney the Sloth wants big things but saves slowly — help her plan how much more to save, how many weeks it takes, and how much to tuck away each week.
description: Sydney the Sloth dreams of BIG things — a skateboard, a telescope, a whole pizza mountain — but she can only save slowly, so she needs a plan. Help her work out how much more she needs, how many weeks of saving it will take, and how much to tuck into the jar each week. It teaches goal-setting and the money-planning maths behind saving up. Grade bands ramp from 'how much more to save', to 'how many weeks to reach the goal', to planning the exact weekly amount to hit a deadline. A free online saving-money and financial-planning game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the amount or number of weeks that reaches the goal.
